name: skill-flashcards
description: SourCards agent skills for spaced-repetition flashcards: formulate/import cards and lint library organization.

interface.shortDescription: Flashcard formulation, lint, and import skills
interface.longDescription: SourCards plugin pack for outer agents. Ships sourcards-import (import) and sourcards-library-lint (library drift), with a shared org-lint core also used by the app Coach.
defaultPrompt: Make flashcards from this note and lint before import
Lint my SourCards library for deck/category drift
Import these cards into SourCards via the API
